title: Shared health, Shared pain
description: One gets hurt, the others feel the same pain. One gets healed, the others also feel the effects. A modpack I made for friends to try and surviving on the same healthbar.
body:
~~Somthing Something Filler text Ba ba ba ba. Okay fine I'll write some info about this modpack.~~

This is a cooperative survival modpack that links every person's health bar and make it at as one shared health bar. There are data packs that will help the overall game play such as campfires being able to heal and being able to chage the time of day. But the campfires are also not overpowered as they go out after some time or while in rain.

Armored players will prevent damage for others when taking damage, but armor is NOT applied to everyone. So any unarmored players will cause everyone to take full damage when hit.

This modpack also has the Dimensional Doors mod and players who are in the Dimensional Doors "Die"/fall in to the void won't kill everyone on the server. Instead of being killed they are teleported to limbo and health is reset to full.

**However I have not tested what happens to the players in the doors dimensions if a player outside of the dimension dies while the player is still inside.** Sooooooo... good luck in finding out what happens?

An issue me and my friends ran into while testing this modpack:

When/If you play on the steam deck with linux the textures don't seem to load, so the person playing is left play on a black world. Soooooo yea I'd say try not to play on Linux unless you can fix it on your end.

Also feel free to change this modpack and credit and links to the mod/datapack below

Shared Life datapack [Link](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shared-life)

Dimensional Doors mod [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimensionaldoors)

Healing Campfires mod [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/healing-campfire)

Campfire Resting mod [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/campfire-resting)

Unlit Campfire mod [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/unlit-campfire)
